name: Mio Chunks Adult Cat Chicken 400g
description: Product Description and Features While specific information on the chicken flavor from Mio is limited online, similar adult cat wet foods like CaDoPet’s 400g Chicken Chunk product offer insights: Soft wet food with chunks of chicken in gravy or pate, ideal for adult cats. Formulated to be complete and balanced, providing essential nutrients for muscle tone, healthy coat, and immune support. Ingredients typically include meat and meat derivatives (chicken minimum 4%), plant products, minerals, and added vitamins such as Vitamin A, D3, and E, and Taurine, essential for feline health. Macronutrient profile: moderate protein (~7.5%), fat (~4%), low fiber (0.4%), with high moisture (~82%) content to aid hydration. No pork or harsh additives, aiming for a natural and healthy meal for your cat. Nutritional Benefits Supports muscle mass with a good proportion of animal protein. Contains Vitamin E for antioxidant protection and Vitamin A & D3 for vision, bone, and immune system support. Taurine is included, critical for heart health and vision in cats. Moisture-rich wet food helps maintain hydration, especially for cats on dry food diets. Free from artificial colors and preservatives, focusing on wholesome nutrition
